plugins.name: figma-design-toolkit
plugins.description: Figma design workflow skills: component-first methodology, Plugin API via Desktop Bridge, and JSX CLI. Works with any Figma design system.

plugins.name: workflow-toolkit
plugins.description: Universal Claude Code workflow skills: project bootstrap, session retro, design system lookup, browser verification.

plugins.name: design-toolkit
plugins.description: Product-design quality skills: design-tweaker (full-stack UX/UI/look-&-feel/AI-slop audit across 7 lenses, reference-grounded, impact×effort ranked) and mobile-audit. Diagnoses, prioritizes, routes execution; does not duplicate it.

plugins.name: obsidian-toolkit
plugins.description: Obsidian vault workflow skills: make the vault the natural home for durable, human-facing documentation. feedback-sweep turns Figma/FigJam review comments into a classified, routed, answered register. Vault-agnostic process; per-project config.
